# komodor_cost_right_sizing_policy_defaults (Data Source)

Returns the default right-sizing policy and per-preset values from the Komodor API (GET /api/v2/cost/right-sizing/policies/defaults). Per-preset percentiles are exposed as Computed scalars; the full structure is also available as a JSON string for jsondecode().



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `development_percentile` (Number) Development preset's default percentile.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `production_percentile` (Number) Production preset's default percentile.
- `raw_json` (String) Full defaults payload as a JSON string. Use jsondecode() to access individual fields (e.g., per-preset guardrails).
- `sandbox_percentile` (Number) Sandbox preset's default percentile.
- `staging_percentile` (Number) Staging preset's default percentile.
